converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Heinrich Ries papers
Ries, Heinrich, 1871-1951.
14-15-691
1.6 cubic feet. 1.6 cubic feet.
1889-1951. Correspondence, diaries, minutes, notes, memoranda, reports, and other papers. Correspondence and other papers relating to Ries' career as professor of geology at Cornell University. Collection material in English 2074689
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M. Warren
Date completed:
Sept. 1984
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, May 2003
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Heinrich Ries was professor of geology at Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Mainly personal and professional correspondence, especially concerning Cornell Geology Department administration and conflicts; correspondents include Henry Platt Cushing, Edmund Ezra Day, Livingston Farrand, Adam C. Gill, Gilbert D. Harris, Charles W. Merriam, Charles S. Prosser, Floyd K. Richtmyer, Ralph S. Tarr, Oscar D. von Engeln, Henry Shaler Williams, and others. Also, one diary kept by Ries (ca. 1914-1939) and one by Henry S. Williams (1889-1892, 1904-1908) concerning departmental affairs, typescript departmental minutes (1904-1914), laboratory notes (1904-1909), memoranda, enrollment statistics, reports, notes, condolence letters, and other items relating to Ries, Williams, and the Geology Department at Cornell University.
NOTES
Related collection: Mary Eleanor Davis. Student Notebooks, #37-5-1244.
Related collection: Donald T. Ries. Papers, #1350.
Cite As:
Heinrich Ries papers, #14-15-691. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Geologists. College teachers. Cushing, Henry Platt. Day, Edmund Ezra, 1883-1951. Farrand, Livingston, 1867-1939. Gill, Adam C. Harris, Gilbert D. Merriam, Charles Warren, 1905- Prosser, Charles S. Richtmyer, F. K. (Floyd Karker), 1881-1939. Tarr, Ralph S. (Ralph Stockman), 1864-1912. Engeln, O. D. von (Oscar Diedrich), 1880-1965. Williams, Henry Shaler. Cornell University -- : Faculty. Cornell University. Geology Department Cornell University. Geology Department -- : Administration.
